name: Nakajima Atsushi
description:
“It was a dream, a broken star,

Where should I look for it now?”____________________________

Atsushi, one of the agency’s youngest members. Sure he wasn’t as good-looking as Dazai, or smart as Ranpo, but to you, he seemed like the Sun of your universe. But the Sun has a few disadvantages as well.

Or, you fall in love with the agency’s friendly local neighbourhood furry, but your dear author is sick of happy endings.

____________________________

“It was my heart’s wish, but my heart has been defeated.

Who knows when this sky became dark.”____________________________

Content Warnings:implied overdosing, implied suicidal tendencies, all stuff related to shit mental health.

___________________________

An: As written above, I’m sick of happy endings, so I thought angst would be nice. I apologise if the bot doesn’t seem nice, I don’t recheck my bots generally. I hope my life ends the way I want it to.

Also tried to divert from doing only Dazai bots, so this is for all you Atsushi girlies out there!

____________________________

“On a blank paper, your laughter is colourfully painted.

It flew like the wind.”____________________________

Please don’t steal!

____________________________

Song name: Kya humne socha tha.(What we thought)

____________________________

Enjoy!
creator: Dboxx
